title: Pink & White Heart Jelly Beans - 500G
features: Spread the love with our delightful Pink & White Heart Jelly Beans! Bursting with fruity flavor and a soft, chewy texture,
these pastel-colored candies are as tasty as they are adorable Perfect for weddings, baby showers, Valentine’s Day, or simply brightening someone’s day,
they make a sweet addition to candy buffets, party favors, or gift bags
Each heart-shaped jelly bean is a little bite of happiness — colourful, fun, and full of love!Sugar, glucose syrup, citric acid, sherbet centre Possible SULPHITES
description: Spread the love with our delightful Pink & White Heart Jelly Beans! Bursting with fruity flavor and a soft, chewy texture, these pastel-colored candies are as tasty as they are adorable. Perfect for weddings, baby showers, Valentine’s Day, or simply brightening someone’s day, they make a sweet addition to candy buffets, party favors, or gift bags. Each heart-shaped jelly bean is a little bite of happiness — colourful, fun, and full of love!Sugar, glucose syrup, citric acid, sherbet centre Possible SULPHITES
